content:
進賊了！彌薩格進賊了！
近期彌薩格廚房頻繁遭小賊光顧，上到美味肉排、下到瓜果蔬菜，都慘遭洗劫！
小賊作案手法高明，鐵門封鎖、高科技陷阱仍未能阻止……

**📢在此，校務處向守密人徵集抓賊妙計：**如何阻止小賊進入廚房？犯案者究竟是誰？請守密人協助我們！

**下面是我們收集到的線索：**
🔍️犯案者似乎更青睞肉食；
🔍️陷阱附近的地板縫隙有幾縷沾著乾涸血漬的白色纖維；
🔍️陷阱的牆壁“遍體鱗傷”，好像發生過打鬥？

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thief! Thief in Mythag!
Recently, Mythag's kitchen has been frequently visited by small thieves. From delicious steaks to fruits and vegetables, everything has been looted!
The thief's method of operation was highly sophisticated, and even iron doors and high-tech traps failed to stop the thief...

**📢 The Office of the Principal hereby calls upon Keepers to submit clever schemes for catching thieves: **
How can we stop the thief from entering the kitchen? And who exactly is the culprit? Please help us, dear Keepers!

**Below are the clues we have collected:**
🔍️The culprit seems to prefer meat;
🔍️A few strands of white fibers with dried blood stains can be seen in the floor gaps near the trap;
🔍️The walls of the trap are all "scars," as if a battle had taken place?
thread_title: 😢求助！守護最好的彌薩格廚房┊Help! Protect the Best Mythag Kitchen
